default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content production, SEO strategies, and new AI-driven visibility tools.](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 6 refreshes, 2 new articles, 2 pending refreshes, 7 articles from last week pending](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Shift in SEO focus: From click-based to visibility-based metrics due to AI-driven search results](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [New tool adoption: Profound for AI visibility tracking, showing promise in sentiment analysis and multi-platform visibility](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Status

  - [6 refreshes completed](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [2 new articles produced](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [2 refreshes pending publication](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [7 articles from previous week still pending](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Workflow challenges: Outdated connector info occasionally causing errors in refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Content generation: Using mix of AirOps, ChatGPT API, and Surfer SEO (for 80+ score and better internal linking)](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

### SEO Strategy Shift

  - [Industry-wide trend: Clicks dropping due to AI-powered search results](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Focus shifting from click-based to visibility-based metrics](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [AI traffic showing growth, impacting leads](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Profound tool adoption: Tracking visibility across AI platforms (Perplexity, Microsoft Co-Pilot, ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews)](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Sentiment analysis: Monitoring positive/negative product mentions on platforms like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### AI Visibility Tools

  - [Profound: Primary tool in use, praised for UI and frequent feature updates](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Other tools mentioned: zipt.dev, Daydream](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Profound functionality:](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
      - [Analyzes 2,800 prompts/week per topic (10 main topics)](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Scores visibility percentage across AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [Reports on sentiment (positive/negative)](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
      - [Recently connected to Airbyte's website for deeper analytics](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

### Content Planning

  - [Current pipeline sufficient for next month](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Need to plan new topics once team is back](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Open to shared keyword research and topic suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tamari to finish reviewing articles by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Nicolas to publish approved content](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [David to inquire about internal insights on AI mention tracking](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Team to select next set of topics from shared list and Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Continue monitoring Profound data for correlations with website performance](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Share Profound insights in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Maintain open communication via Slack for any immediate needs](https://fathom.video/share/69i9sfS2xK7qXd4uUS5nocA4yP3gdCBE?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

action_items.description: Ask team about AI mentions tracking tools; compare w/ Profound; share insights w/ Tamari
Review articles in sheet by EOD; inform Nicolas when complete
Publish articles after Tamari's review; select next set of topics from shared list & Airtable
